case_title: REINA PEREZ VS. SDB CLEANING SOLUTIONS

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ, REINA AS TO DEFENDANT SDB CLEANING SOLUTIONS AN FTB SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREZ, REINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SDB CLEANING SOLUTIONS AN FTB SUSPENDED CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $8,455.08 PRINCIPAL, $1,292.45 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,972.53, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
